mapper.select:
select vfd.id function_domain_id,
vfd.functional_domain_name functional_domain_name,
vfd.functional_domain_name_en functional_domain_name,
AVG(vdt.calculate_score) industry_avg_score from vehicle_functional_domain vfd LEFT JOIN vehicle_domain_tag vdtg on vdtg.functional_domain_id = vfd.id left join vehicle_domain_index vdi on vfd.id = vdi.functional_domain LEFT JOIN vehicle_domain_tree vdt on vdi.id = vdt.domain_index_id where vdt.calculate_score is not NULL and vdtg.tag_name=#{domainTagName} GROUP BY vfd.id

SELECT vdt.tag_name as domain_tag_name, AVG(vdtr.calculate_score) as avg_score FROM vehicle_domain_tag vdt left join vehicle_domain_index vdi on vdi.functional_domain = vdt.functional_domain_id left join vehicle_domain_tree vdtr on vdtr.domain_index_id = vdi.id where vdt.tag_name = #{domainTagName} and vdtr.calculate_score > 0 GROUP BY vdt.tag_name

SELECT a.id,
a.functional_domain_name,
a.functional_domain_name_en functional_domain_name,
a.status FROM `vehicle_functional_domain` a , vehicle_domain_tag b where a.id = b.functional_domain_id and b.tag_name = "功能域表现"

select d.id vehicle_id,
CONCAT(e.brand,'-',d.vehicle_model) vehicle_name, b.index_name general_ability_tag,
CONCAT(e.brand_en,'-',d.vehicle_model) vehicle_name, b.index_name_en general_ability_tag,
a.calculate_score general_ability_value from vehicle_domain_tree a left join vehicle_domain_index b on a.domain_index_id = b.id left join vehicle_functional_domain c on b.functional_domain = c.id left join vehicle_base_info d on d.id = a.vehicle_base_id left join vehicle_brand e on e.id = d.brand_id where c.id = 450679990120349699 and d.id in
#{id}

select b.id action_description_id, d.id vehicle_id,
CONCAT(e.brand,'-',d.vehicle_model) vehicle_name, b.index_name action_description,
CONCAT(e.brand_en,'-',d.vehicle_model) vehicle_name, b.index_name_en action_description,
a.presentation_value action_number from vehicle_domain_tree a left join vehicle_domain_index b on a.domain_index_id = b.id left join vehicle_functional_domain c on b.functional_domain = c.id left join vehicle_base_info d on d.id = a.vehicle_base_id left join vehicle_brand e on e.id = d.brand_id where c.id = 450679990120349700 and a.presentation_value != -1 and d.id in
#{id}

select
b.index_name general_ability_tag,
b.index_name_en general_ability_tag,
AVG(a.calculate_score) general_ability_value from vehicle_domain_tree a left join vehicle_domain_index b on a.domain_index_id = b.id left join vehicle_functional_domain c on b.functional_domain = c.id left join vehicle_base_info d on d.id = a.vehicle_base_id left join vehicle_brand e on e.id = d.brand_id where c.id = 450679990120349699 and a.presentation_value!=0 and a.presentation_value!=-1 GROUP BY b.id

select b.id action_description_id,
b.index_name action_description,
b.index_name_en action_description,
AVG(a.presentation_value) action_number from vehicle_domain_tree a left join vehicle_domain_index b on a.domain_index_id = b.id left join vehicle_functional_domain c on b.functional_domain = c.id left join vehicle_base_info d on d.id = a.vehicle_base_id left join vehicle_brand e on e.id = d.brand_id where c.id = 450679990120349700 and a.presentation_value!=-1 GROUP BY b.id
SELECT a.id functional_id, a.functional_domain_name, b.id domain_index_id, b.index_name FROM vehicle_functional_domain a, vehicle_domain_index b where b.functional_domain = a.id

SELECT b.functional_domain_name, c.id function_index_id, a.index_name, c.test_case_content FROM vehicle_domain_index a, vehicle_functional_domain b, beeeval_open_source_case c WHERE a.functional_domain = b.id AND b.id !=450679990120349698 AND c.domain_index_id = a.id

SELECT b.functional_domain_name function_domain_name, a.index_name domain_index_name, a.id index_id FROM vehicle_domain_index a, vehicle_functional_domain b WHERE a.functional_domain = b.id AND b.id !=450679990120349698
